creator: andrew.wiles@avatastic.co.uk
text:
After further investigation, this behaviour occurs if your original 
config file doesn't contain the sysconftool markers.

I've been able to stop my configuration files being over-written by 
tuning the newly installed authmysqlrc (from authmysqlrc.dist) to my 
needs and I now see the same behaviour as Oliver.

Regards,
Andrew D Wiles.
